## Gotchas (carried + new)
- **`e2e/` NOT in tsconfig** ‚Üí a wire/colour/constant/gameplay change can pass `tsc`+unit yet fail Playwright. ALWAYS run the gating lane (`npx playwright test --grep-invert "@quarantine-flaky"`) on lobby/layout/net/gameplay changes. (S73 ran it on BOTH priorities ‚Äî 27 pass + 1 pre-existing skip.)
- **PROTOCOL_VERSION is 5** (UNCHANGED S73 ‚Äî the stable-lobby-seats change is wire-shape-IDENTICAL: a holed `LOBBY_PRESENCE` is a COMPACT array of occupied seats with a non-contiguous `seat` FIELD, valid under `isValidRoster`'s `length ‚â§ MAX` check; the client renders the received roster via `lobbyView` `bySeat.get(i)`). A FUTURE bump must update the v2/v6 protocol-mismatch e2e.
- **Lobby seats are STABLE / non-compacting (S73 P1)**: host holds `session.lobbySeats` (peerId‚Üíseat, the SINGLE source of truth). `reconcileLobbySeats` (pure) keeps survivors / frees a departed peer's hole / lowest-free-fills new joiners; `buildLobbyRoster` = STABLE projection (holes ‚Üí empty cells) for `LOBBY_PRESENCE`; `buildMatchRoster` = DENSE projection (contiguous `0..N-1`) for Begin (`radialSpawnPos` REQUIRES contiguous seats, else avatars overlap). `teardownNet` + a defensive host-start reset both clear it.
- **All 3 hazards teardown on ALL 3 PLAYING-exit edges (S73 P2 completed the matrix)**: WIN_TRIGGER now clears bombs too (`teardownBombs`), alongside `START_GAME` + `RETURN_TO_TITLE`. The audit pattern: a per-entity √ó per-exit-edge matrix sweep catches what per-feature CHECKs miss.
- **New stochastic content = SEPARATE seeded RNG stream** (spark `rng` / `bombRng` / `potatoRng`) so `save.replay` byte-equivalence holds. Lobby seating is real-time presence, NOT replayed.
- **session-state.json** = atomic Node `.cjs` read-modify-write (PS mangles quotes/em-dash; `type:module` ‚Üí helpers MUST be `.cjs`; delete after ‚Äî knip scans `.claude/`).
- **`rm -rf` is guardrail-blocked** ‚Üí `rmdir` (empty) or `rm <file>`.
- **`pre-handoff-review.py`** = GLOBAL advisory OS card (teeth 2026-07-15) ‚Äî don't `--approve`/`--clear` from a project session.
